text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I knew it! They've reproduced the setting of Rhodonite on this campsite!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: But I'm on my own... If I don't... f-find some... "villagers" to join me...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh no! I lost sight of the firefly!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
W-wait, Taiki! You never know what could be lurking in the forest at
night...

text_block_list.name: Taiki & Dober
text_block_list.text:
WAAAH!
NOOO!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: S-sorry I scared you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm sorry for screaming so loud. I didn't know you were here
camping too.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ah, yes! For some, um... treasure hunting.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Treasure hunting?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes! You see, the natural features of this campsite mimic the setting
of a children's bo—

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I mean, not a book. It's a... movie. There's a forest just like this one in
a movie I saw.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: What?! That's amazing!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
A-at first, I thought it was just a coincidence, but I did some research,
and it turns out that the owner of this campsite is the same person
who made the movie.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And now after exploring it for myself, I'm certain. This campsite is a
puzzle for fans, a secret map to the land of dreams!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Which means, there must be a mystical stone somewhere around here
that grants wishes, the Dreamstone. So that's why I came here... Um,
hello?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Unbelievable! You're sayin' there's a real-life adventure to be had
right here?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Taiki looks so excited. But of course, she loves this kind of thing. ...I
know! We should join the treasure hunt!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Oh, but... springing that on Rob Roy might intrude on her plans. It
looks like she came here alone, so maybe she wanted to enjoy it
quietly on her own.)

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey, would you mind if we joined you on your treasure hunt? We'll
have fun together! It'll be exciting!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wait. Ah...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Please do! This story is about individuals coalescing into a
single team to find the treasure after all!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: What does that mean? Having fun together?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Five villagers, each with their own qualities, come together and
brave danger in search of the wish-granting stone for the sake of their
village.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
They're a ragtag bunch at first, but along the way they learn to
combine their skills and ultimately achieve their goal. The last
chapter is a real tearjerker...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry. I got a little carried away! Anyway, in the story, the traps are
impossible to clear alone!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: So I'd be thrilled if you were to lend me a hand!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Woohoo! Thank you! If we need five people, then... Okay! I'll ask
those two tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yay! A treasure, treasure, treasure hunt!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'll show you what Treasure Hunter El is made of!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you! I can't believe I get to go looking for the Dreamstone
in a team of five, just like in the story!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: (...What now? I lied to them...)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: (Rhodonite and the Dreamstone. No matter how many times I read it, I always get absorbed into its deep, intricate world!)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(...Whoops. I only meant to check the features of the forest, but I
ended up reading through the story! I've got to go take a bath!)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: (But... yeah. I am excited to see the campsite.)

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy, do you have any booster serum I could borrow? I left mine
in my room.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Um, uh... B-booster? What's that?

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
...Huh? You know, like, the first step of your skincare routine. The one
that goes on before toner.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh, r-right. I'm sorry, I don't use those kinds of—

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text: I have some! I did a bunch of odd jobs so I could stock up. Here!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: Wait, this is Violet! Are you sure?!

text_block_list.name: Classmate C
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! I use that too! Curren Chan introduced me to it. Apparently, it
makes your skin super glowy if you use the whole line. I can only
dream of that though.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(Wow. Look at everyone gathering round. They're all smiling. So this
is what they're all into...)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: (I had no idea.)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: (...Should I know this kind of stuff? My head's always in a book...)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: (This is a little embarrassing...)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(The truth is, it's not really a movie, it's a children's book. I thought
it'd sound more grown-up if I said movie, so...)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(I should set the record straight. But... I'm sure no one would really
mind either way...)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...Yes. It's fine. It'll be fine.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Rob Roy, come on! Let's go on our big adventure!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ah, c-coming!
